origin_reflect.description: Test for CORS misconfiguration that reflects any Origin header

payloads.description: Arbitrary origin to test reflection in Access-Control-Allow-Origin
Subdomain of target appended to attacker domain to bypass suffix checks
Attacker domain prefixed with target to bypass prefix checks
Port-based bypass — validators match domain but not port

null_origin.description: Test for null origin CORS bypass (file:// or sandboxed iframe)

payloads.description: Null origin to test if Access-Control-Allow-Origin: null is returned
Sandboxed iframe to generate null origin request
Backtick percent-encoded — parser quirk in some browsers/servers
Subdomain of trusted domain (requires XSS on subdomain)
Domain ending in trusted name to exploit suffix matching

preflight_bypass.description: Test CORS preflight handling and simple request bypass

payloads.description: Simple GET request with origin (no preflight for simple requests)

payloads.payload:
Origin: https://attacker.com
Access-Control-Request-Method: POST
Content-Type: text/plain
payloads.description: POST with text/plain bypasses preflight (simple request)
